scripts.deploy: bun build src/index --compile --outfile _todos && mv _todos $HOME/.bin/todos && mkdir -p $HOME/.bash_completion.d && todos completions bash > $HOME/.bash_completion.d/todos
scripts.test:unit: bun test src/todos.test.ts src/utils/useCache.test.ts src/utils/router.test.ts src/config.test.ts
